title: PlaneRelativeX Property
description:
For the end conditions related to positions, this property sets the relative position in X direction to set Plane.

It is used when RelativePlane is specified by PosCheckType.

X direction follows the coordinate system specified by PlaneRelativeOrg.

Values

Minimum value -2000

Maximum value 2000

Default:  0

See Also: PlaneRelativeX Property

PlaneRelativeY Property

PlaneRelativeZ Property
see_also:
Applies To

Press Object, PressMove Object
